description: H16: Model-aware distillation benchmarks — track extraction quality per backend model

distillation_prompts.name: entity_extraction
distillation_prompts.input: We decided to use PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector for our RAG pipeline. The team lead Sarah approved this after benchmarking against Pinecone.

distillation_prompts.name: temporal_ordering
distillation_prompts.input: In January we used Redis. By March we switched to Memcached. In June we went back to Redis with cluster mode.

distillation_prompts.name: contradiction_detection
distillation_prompts.input: Memory A (Jan 5): Use tabs for indentation. Memory B (Mar 12): Always use 2-space indentation.

distillation_prompts.name: low_signal_filtering
distillation_prompts.input:
ok
fixed
We migrated the auth service to use JWT with RS256 signing
done
lgtm
distillation_prompts.expected_kept: We migrated the auth service to use JWT with RS256 signing

distillation_prompts.name: relationship_inference
distillation_prompts.input: The payment service calls the user service for auth validation. The user service depends on the PostgreSQL database. The notification service subscribes to payment events.

regression_policy.description: If any model drops >10% on any metric vs previous run, flag as regression
